description: Native American English, a soft Korean cadence beneath flat Detroit vowels. Female, late 40s. Warm, clear, well-supported. Persona: steady home caregiver. Emotion: warm, level, dryly funny. A low, even alto with a calm caregiver's grounding; plain declarative phrasing, economical and unsentimental, delivering hard news as gently as handing over a task. Lips-pressed restraint under the warmth, measured but never weary.
text: [warm] Sit. Eat first... then we talk. You came home cold again. [sighs] The house is cold, the world colder, and still they keep the machines warm. [serious] We have each other. That will do.
